hawkish_phrases: two per cent was not a ceiling
negative and positive deviations of inflation from the target to be equally undesirable
the key ECB interest rates would remain its primary instruments
careful proportionality assessments, including analysis of the benefits and possible side effects of monetary policy measures
risks of the unanchoring of longer-term inflation expectations from the two per cent target
dovish_phrases: especially forceful or persistent monetary policy measures to avoid negative deviations from the inflation target becoming entrenched
might also imply a transitory period in which inflation was moderately above target
appropriate policy response depended on the circumstances as well as on the source, magnitude and persistence of the shocks
forward guidance, asset purchases and longer-term refinancing operations would remain an integral part of the ECB's toolkit
especially forceful or persistent reaction to large adverse shocks
summary: This July 2021 meeting focused on announcing the ECB's strategy review with no policy decision, unanimously approving a symmetric 2% inflation target and acknowledging that achieving the target near the lower bound might require especially forceful measures and transitory periods of moderately above-target inflation, presenting a mildly dovish bias within a strategic framework update.
